summary: AI Signal Intelligence feature testing completed. Backend API fully functional with 16/16 tests passing. Pro/Elite tier signals include comprehensive AI explanations (trend analysis, market sentiment, key indicators, risk level, suggested actions). Free tier signals are 15-minute delayed and currently don't show AI explanations because older signals were generated before the feature was implemented - this is expected behavior.

integration_issues.issue: Free tier users don't see AI explanations because delayed signals (15+ min old) were generated before the AI feature was implemented. This will resolve naturally as new signals with AI explanations age past 15 minutes.

passed_tests: GET /api/signals/free - Returns delayed signals for free tier (15 min delay)
GET /api/signals/tiered?wallet_address=PRO - Returns real-time signals for Pro users
Pro signals have AI explanation field populated
trend_analysis structure: direction (bullish/bearish/neutral), strength, timeframe, description
market_sentiment structure: overall, score (-100 to 100), factors list, news_impact
key_indicators structure: RSI (value, signal), MACD (signal, histogram), moving_averages, volume, support_resistance
Free vs Pro signal delay comparison (15 min vs 0 min)
All crypto symbols (BTC, ETH, SOL) have signals
Signal generation creates signals with AI explanations
Subscription tier endpoint returns correct tier
critical_code_review_comments: SignalIntelligenceService (signal_intelligence.py) correctly generates AI explanations using GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations
Fallback rule-based explanation generation works when LLM is unavailable

TradingSignal model includes all AI explanation fields (explanation, reasoning, trend_analysis, market_sentiment, key_indicators, risk_level, confidence_factors, potential_catalysts, suggested_action)
Signal generation stores AI explanations in MongoDB correctly
Frontend App.js correctly maps AI explanation fields from API response
Frontend has expandable 'View Full AI Analysis' section with trend analysis, market sentiment, key indicators display
Tiered signal delivery working correctly (free=15min delay, pro/elite=real-time)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_ai_signal_intelligence.py - Created comprehensive AI Signal Intelligence tests (16 tests)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (UI loads correctly, signals display, AI explanation UI components present)

context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Signal Intelligence feature is fully implemented and working. Backend generates AI explanations using GPT-5.2 for all new signals. Pro/Elite users see real-time signals with full AI explanations. Free tier users see 15-minute delayed signals - they will see AI explanations once signals with AI explanations age past 15 minutes. Test user 0xTEST_AI_SIGNALS_PRO has Pro status for testing.
